input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this .NET project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to:

1. First, explore the project structure to understand what we're working with
2. Set up and run code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

data.content: Now I'll run the tests with code coverage collection enabled.

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-ea2c8b029c76493080760ffb22b12c48 && dotnet test --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory ./coverage-results --verbosity quiet 2>&1

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture of the project. Let me run code coverage using coverlet (which is already referenced in the test project) and analyze the results.

I'll run the tests with coverage collection enabled, then analyze the results.
